results.title: Alternative CAD Platform | IntelliCAD Technology Consortium
results.content:
The purpose of the cooperative is to provide software technology and services for our members, not to generate profit for shareholders. That means members get the best possible price for our technology, third-party components, and development services.

As a cooperative, the members are nominated to and elect our board which directs our mission, sets the annual membership fee, and determines pricing for services.

As other for-profit CAD platforms continue to push further into the vertical markets created by their own third-party developers, you can't afford not to look at an alternative, non-profit CAD platform like IntelliCAD Co-op.

## CAD Development Platform. [...] # IntelliCAD Co-op A Platform You Can Build On Real. Affordable. Cooperative. CAD Development Platform.

## Real.

IntelliCAD is a professional grade, commercial 2D/3D CAD software program and solutions development platform.

Why spend time developing the core CAD technology needed to support your vertical solutions?   
Using IntelliCAD Co-op as your development platform allows you to focus on what's really important —   
the productive vertical solutions your customers are asking for.

## Affordable.

For less than half the price of a full-time developer, you can distribute a complete CAD engine incorporating over 400 man-years of intellectual property. [...] ## Developing More Software Together

Only ITC members distribute end-user products so our success only comes through the success of our members. Our real strength comes from working together.

results.title: Top 10 AutoCAD Alternatives for Architects, Engineers, and Designers
results.content:
## Top 10 AutoCAD Alternatives

### 1. SketchUp

SketchUp is a versatile 3D modeling software known for its intuitive interface and ease of use. It offers powerful tools perfect for creating detailed models, from architectural designs and interiors to furniture and even 3D printing projects like 3D-printed houses.

Ideal for architects, interior designers, and hobbyists, SketchUp makes it easy to quickly visualize and conceptualize designs, including buildings, landscapes, and interiors. With an extensive library of pre-built models, it’s perfect for building realistic environments and showcasing ideas to clients. As a user-friendly alternative to AutoDesk, SketchUp is a go-to tool for efficient and creative 3D modeling.

Pros: [...] ### 6. TinkerCAD

TinkerCAD is not only a great tool for beginners but can also be useful for more experienced users who need to quickly create simple 3D models. Its intuitive interface and drag-and-drop tools make it easy to create basic shapes and designs. However, it may not be the best option for advanced or complex projects as it lacks some of the more robust features found in other CAD software.

One of the major advantages of TinkerCAD is its affordability – or rather, lack thereof. The software is free to use, making it an attractive choice for students or hobbyists just starting out with 3D modeling. It also runs entirely online and does not require any additional downloads or installations, making it easily accessible from any device with internet access.

Pros: [...] ### 7. NanoCAD

NanoCAD is a free and user-friendly CAD software offering various basic and advanced features for creating 2D and 3D models. It has a familiar interface similar to AutoCAD, making it easy for users to transition from one software to another. NanoCAD also offers a comprehensive set of tools for drawing, editing, and annotating designs. Additionally, it can work with multiple file formats such as DWG, DXF, and DWF.

Pros:

 User-friendly interface
 Offers both 2D and 3D modeling capabilities
 Supports multiple file formats
 Advanced features like parametric modeling and dynamic input

Cons:

 Limited advanced features compared to other CAD software
 Requires a paid subscription for technical support

# TinkerCad alternatives

Question

Been using TinkerCad for the last 4 years and I can make everything I need. Really like the way it works.

But I really want a program that I can have locally on my Mac. I don’t like I need an internet connection to use it. We had our internet go down recently and that got me thinking I’m screwed without a connection.

Any alternatives that are as easy to use like TinkerCad and don’t cost a fortune. Also not keen on anything that’s subscription based. [...] [](

results.title: The Tinkercad alternative to level up your 3D design
results.content:
Shapr3D is excellent for students, and offers free licenses for educational use for students, teachers, and faculty members at accredited institutions. Visit our EDU page to request an educational license for non-commercial use.

Shapr3D is perfect for projects that require a high level of precision, such as parts that need to be fit together. You can create functional 3D printed parts (brackets, enclosures, gears), woodworking and furniture, or home DIY projects where exact measurements are required. [...] ### Work offline, wherever inspiration strikes

Tinkercad is browser based, making it easy to get started. But there’s no way to work without an internet connection, and poor connectivity can cause lagging.  
  
Shapr3D runs natively on iPad, Mac, and Windows, allowing you to work without an internet connection. It doesn’t require specialized hardware, so you get fast modeling speeds without lag on a tablet, laptop, or desktop computer.

## Easier and more affordable than traditional CAD [...] Shapr3D is a multi-platform tool available on iPad (optimized to work with the Apple Pencil), macOS, Windows, and Apple Vision Pro. Get more info on our Compatible Devices page.

Tinkercad is free to use. Shapr3Doffers a free version, which is limited to 2 active designs and basic exports.

Shapr3D’s Pro version is a subscription-based model that exports high-fidelity files in a variety of formats, including 3MF, STEP, IGES, OBJ, and STL. While it is more expensive than some hobbyist tools, Shapr3D Pro is significantly more affordable and accessible than traditional enterprise CAD software.
